data.title: BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC January 2025 Portfolio Update
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest update is out from BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC GBP ( (GB:THRG) ).

BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC reported a net asset value increase of 0.2% for January 2025, underperforming its benchmark. The trust faced challenges due to market volatility, economic concerns, and global geopolitical tensions. Despite these challenges, certain holdings like Rotork and Luceco showed strong performance driven by solid results and strategic acquisitions. However, a short position in the semiconductor sector and a large acquisition by Gamma Communications impacted overall performance.

More about BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC GBP

BlackRock Throgmorton Trust PLC primarily operates in the investment management industry, focusing on smaller companies listed on the United Kingdom’s stock exchanges. The trust seeks to achieve long-term capital growth through its diversified portfolio, which includes various sectors such as industrials, financials, and consumer discretionary.

YTD Price Performance: -1.18%

Average Trading Volume: 396,565

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

data.title: Imerys Achieves Strong 2024 Results with Strategic Growth and Sustainability Initiatives
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

IMERYS SA ( (FR:NK) ) has issued an update.

Imerys reported strong financial results for 2024, with a significant organic growth of 1% in revenue and a notable 11.4% increase in adjusted EBITDA. The company’s strategic investments in production capacity and new product launches have driven volume recovery and improved operational leverage. Additionally, Imerys has made substantial progress in reducing greenhouse gas emissions, aligning with its sustainability goals. The acquisition of Chemviron’s European diatomite and perlite business further strengthens its market position, while the resolution of the Chapter 11 procedure for its North American talc entities marks a positive step in addressing historical liabilities.

More about IMERYS SA

Imerys SA is a company operating in the industrial minerals sector, providing a range of products and services to various markets including food, beverage, filtration, and pharmaceuticals. The company is focused on expanding its production capacities and launching innovative mineral solutions, with a strong emphasis on sustainability and decarbonization efforts.

YTD Price Performance: -2.05%

Average Trading Volume: 6,046

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Buy

Current Market Cap: €2.38B

data.title: DORE Enhances Stakeholder Value with Strategic Share Buyback
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

The latest announcement is out from Downing Renewables & Infrastructure Trust Plc ( (GB:DORE) ).

Downing Renewables & Infrastructure Trust Plc has repurchased 100,000 ordinary shares at an average price of 83.61 pence each, holding them in treasury. This transaction leaves the company with 170,953,776 voting shares in circulation. The move is part of DORE’s broader strategy of managing its share capital and supporting shareholder value. The company’s focus on renewable energy and infrastructure assets aligns with its commitment to the green economy and sustainable investment, potentially enhancing its industry standing and stakeholder confidence.

More about Downing Renewables & Infrastructure Trust Plc

Downing Renewables & Infrastructure Trust Plc (DORE) is a closed-end investment trust focused on investing in renewable energy and infrastructure assets in the UK and Northern Europe. It aims to provide sustainable income and capital growth, contributing to climate change mitigation. DORE is recognized for its efforts in the green economy, having received the London Stock Exchange’s Green Economy Mark and winning the ‘Renewables Fund of the Year’ at the Sustainable Investment Awards. Managed by Downing LLP, an established investment manager with significant expertise in the renewables sector, DORE’s strategy emphasizes diversification by geography, technology, revenue, and project stages to ensure stable revenues and consistent income for shareholders.

YTD Price Performance: 9.87%

Average Trading Volume: 261,796

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: £145.8M

Finsbury Gwth & Inc Shs ( (GB:FGT) ) has provided an update.

Finsbury Growth & Income Trust PLC has purchased 31,022 of its own ordinary shares at a price of 924.38 pence per share, which will be held in treasury. GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP ( (GB:GCP) ) has issued an update.

GCP Infrastructure Investments Ltd announced the repurchase of 500,000 of its own ordinary shares at an average price of 75.70 pence per share, to be held in treasury, following shareholder authorization. This transaction affects the total number of voting rights, which stakeholders should consider in their interests. The move reflects GCP Infra’s ongoing commitment to managing its capital structure and providing value to shareholders, supporting its strategic focus on sustainable infrastructure investment.

More about GCP Infra Invt Shs GBP

GCP Infra is a closed-ended investment company and FTSE-250 constituent, with its shares traded on the London Stock Exchange. The company aims to provide shareholders with long-term, regular distributions and capital preservation by investing in UK infrastructure debt and similar assets, focusing on projects with long-term, public sector-backed revenues and partial inflation protection. It has received the London Stock Exchange’s Green Economy Mark for its environmental contributions.

data.title: Angkor Resources Launches Drilling at Wild Boar Prospect in Cambodia
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Angkor Gold ( (TSE:ANK) ) just unveiled an announcement.

Angkor Resources Corp. has started diamond drilling at the Wild Boar prospect in Cambodia’s Andong Meas tenement, targeting gold anomalies identified through recent magnetic surveys and surface samples. The project, which involves partnerships and planned compensation for landowners, is expected to last several weeks and aims to explore significant gold and copper potential, enhancing Angkor’s strategic position in the mining sector.

More about Angkor Gold

Angkor Resources Corp. operates in the mining industry, focusing on gold and copper exploration. The company is engaged in projects in Cambodia, including the Andong Meas tenement known for its gold and copper prospects.

data.title: Teck Resources Achieves Record Copper Production and Strengthens Financial Position in 2024
data.description:
Discover the Best Stocks and Maximize Your Portfolio:

  • See what stocks are receiving strong buy ratings from top-rated analysts.
  • Filter, analyze, and streamline your search for investment opportunities with TipRanks’ Stock Screener.

Teck Resources ( ($TSE:TECK.B) ) has issued an update.

Teck Resources Limited reported its unaudited fourth-quarter results for 2024, highlighting a year of transformation with record copper production and the sale of its steelmaking coal business. The company returned $1.8 billion to shareholders in 2024 and reduced its debt by $1.8 billion, achieving a strong financial position that supports its long-term growth strategy. Teck’s Quebrada Blanca (QB) project ramped up effectively, contributing to record quarterly copper production, and the company has set ambitious targets for 2025. Teck also achieved notable profitability and revenue growth in its copper and zinc businesses, while maintaining a low High-Potential Incident Frequency rate, and received recognition for its workplace and sustainability efforts.

More about Teck Resources

Teck Resources Limited is a company based in Vancouver, British Columbia, primarily focused on energy transition metals, with significant operations in copper production.

YTD Price Performance: 4.35%

Average Trading Volume: 2,578,484

Technical Sentiment Consensus Rating: Sell

Current Market Cap: $21.75B
